case_title: CED/ CITY ELECTRIC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS DESBIENS, DAVID P.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CED/ CITY ELECTRIC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT DESBIENS, DAVID P. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-20-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
